'''âv-w-p-z''' ('''kavawpezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vehicle|vehicle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vehicle|vehicle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-w-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavawpezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivawpezoko|thivawpezoko]] || [[word:jivawpezoko|jivawpezoko]] || [[word:shivawpezoko|shivawpezoko]] || [[word:kivawpezoko|kivawpezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvawpezoko|thuthuvawpezoko]] || [[word:jujuvawpezoko|jujuvawpezoko]] || [[word:shushuvawpezoko|shushuvawpezoko]] || [[word:kukuvawpezoko|kukuvawpezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvawpezoko|thuvawpezoko]] || [[word:juvawpezoko|juvawpezoko]] || [[word:shuvawpezoko|shuvawpezoko]] || [[word:kuvawpezoko|kuvawpezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvawpezoko|thuvawpezoko]] || [[word:juvawpezoko|juvawpezoko]] || [[word:shuvawpezoko|shuvawpezoko]] || [[word:kuvawpezoko|kuvawpezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevawpezoko|thevawpezoko]] || [[word:jevawpezoko|jevawpezoko]] || [[word:shevawpezoko|shevawpezoko]] || [[word:kevawpezoko|kevawpezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovawpezoko|thothovawpezoko]] || [[word:jojovawpezoko|jojovawpezoko]] || [[word:shoshovawpezoko|shoshovawpezoko]] || [[word:kokovawpezoko|kokovawpezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovawpezoko|thovawpezoko]] || [[word:jovawpezoko|jovawpezoko]] || [[word:shovawpezoko|shovawpezoko]] || [[word:kovawpezoko|kovawpezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovawpezoko|thovawpezoko]] || [[word:jovawpezoko|jovawpezoko]] || [[word:shovawpezoko|shovawpezoko]] || [[word:kovawpezoko|kovawpezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvawpezoko|thĂŠvawpezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvawpezoko|jĂŠvawpezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvawpezoko|shĂŠvawpezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvawpezoko|kĂŠvawpezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavawpezoko|thathavawpezoko]] || [[word:jajavawpezoko|jajavawpezoko]] || [[word:shashavawpezoko|shashavawpezoko]] || [[word:kakavawpezoko|kakavawpezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavawpezoko|thavawpezoko]] || [[word:javawpezoko|javawpezoko]] || [[word:shavawpezoko|shavawpezoko]] || [[word:kavawpezoko|kavawpezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavawpezoko|thavawpezoko]] || [[word:javawpezoko|javawpezoko]] || [[word:shavawpezoko|shavawpezoko]] || [[word:kavawpezoko|kavawpezoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
